title: ClickStack · Executive Summary
description: One-pane health overview across services, Kubernetes, and logs — top signals from all three ClickStack Grafana dashboards.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT 100 * countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6 AS value FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT count(DISTINCT ServiceName) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS requests
FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, 100 * countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) AS error_pct
FROM ${database}.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT count() AS value FROM (
  SELECT ResourceAttributes['k8s.node.name'] AS n, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'k8s.node.condition_ready' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY n HAVING v = 1)

SELECT count() AS value FROM (
  SELECT ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.uid'] AS u, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'k8s.pod.phase' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY u HAVING v = 2)

SELECT count() AS value FROM (
  SELECT ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.uid'] AS u, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'k8s.pod.phase' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY u HAVING v NOT IN (2, 3))

SELECT sum(d) AS value FROM (
  SELECT concat(ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.uid'], '/', ResourceAttributes['k8s.container.name']) AS c, max(Value) - min(Value) AS d
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'k8s.container.restarts' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY c)
SELECT count() / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
SELECT countIf((SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error', 'fatal'))) / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
SELECT 100 * countIf((SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error', 'fatal'))) / nullIf(count(), 0) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
SELECT countIf((SeverityNumber >= 21 OR lower(SeverityText) = 'fatal')) AS value FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, multiIf(SeverityNumber >= 21, 'fatal', SeverityNumber >= 17, 'error', SeverityNumber >= 13, 'warn', SeverityNumber >= 9, 'info', SeverityNumber >= 5, 'debug', SeverityNumber >= 1, 'trace', SeverityText != '', lower(SeverityText), 'unspecified') AS severity, count() AS logs
FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY time, severity ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, ServiceName AS service, count() AS errors
FROM ${database}.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND (SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error', 'fatal'))
GROUP BY time, service HAVING errors > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT ServiceName AS "Service",
       round(count() / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime), 2) AS "Req/s",
       countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS "Errors",
       round(100 * countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS "Error %",
       round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 1) AS "p95 ms"
FROM ${database}.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Server'
GROUP BY ServiceName
ORDER BY "Error %" DESC, "Req/s" DESC

SELECT ((SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_refused_spans_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))
      + (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))
      + (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))) / greatest(dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime), 1) AS value

SELECT (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_exporter_send_failed_log_records_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) / greatest(dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime), 1) AS value

SELECT 100 * (SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_exporter_queue_size' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) / greatest((SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_exporter_queue_capacity' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])), 1) AS value

SELECT ((SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))
      + (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))
      + (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id']))) / greatest(dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime), 1) AS value

SELECT (SELECT sum(d) FROM (SELECT max(Value) - min(Value) AS d FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_FailedQuery' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) / greatest(dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime), 1) AS value

SELECT (SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_Query' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) AS value

SELECT (SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_MemoryTracking' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) AS value

SELECT 100 * (SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskAvailable_default' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])) / greatest((SELECT sum(v) FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS v FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskTotal_default' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) GROUP BY ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'])), 1) AS value

panels.title: Collector throughput (accepted vs refused, per interval)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time,
       sumIf(d, kind = 'accepted') AS accepted,
       sumIf(d, kind = 'refused') AS refused
FROM (
  SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time,
         if(MetricName LIKE '%refused%', 'refused', 'accepted') AS kind,
         ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'] AS i, MetricName AS m,
         max(Value) - min(Value) AS d
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum
  WHERE MetricName IN (
    'otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total', 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total', 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total',
    'otelcol_receiver_refused_spans_total', 'otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total', 'otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total')
    AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY time, kind, i, m)
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time,
       sumIf(d, m = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_Query') AS queries,
       sumIf(d, m = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_FailedQuery') AS failed
FROM (
  SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, MetricName AS m, ResourceAttributes['service.instance.id'] AS i,
         max(Value) - min(Value) AS d
  FROM ${database}.otel_metrics_sum
  WHERE MetricName IN ('ClickHouseProfileEvents_Query', 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_FailedQuery') AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix)
  GROUP BY time, m, i)
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
